title: Rapid Protocol for Single Sporing Ascochyta rabiei
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dbao9","text":"A rapid protocol for single sporing of A. rabiei. This protocol reduces the time required for single sporing to just 48 hours and allows rapid detection of contamination. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":39,"length":10},{"style":"italic","offset":170,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Allow to cool to room temperature.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":53,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"65ld3","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cqrru","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"thickness","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"5CD864203BA511EB984E57949F8895C2","id":0,"label":"","unit":200,"value":"2"}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"","data":{"amount":"10","guid":"462F26F03BA511EB984E57949F8895C2","id":0,"label":"MilliQ ","unit":2}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"40bd","text":"Ethanol is highly flammable, please use with cautious and wear appropriate PPE.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pour water agar plates (~ 2 cm thickness and containing antibiotic) 1-2 days before culturing to ensure plates are dry.
Autoclave 20 ml glass bottles (McCartney) containing 10 ml milliQ water with aluminum lids loosely on. Allow to cool to room temperature.
Add ~ 2 drops of Lactic acid Contributed by users (approximately 30 µL ) to each bottle.
Place a short segment of stem with lesion and visible pycnidia into bottle, tighten lid and shake to mix.
Vigorously shake McCartney bottle to release spores into suspension (shake for 00:00:40 ).
Pour suspension on to prepared media and immediately pour off.
Seal petri dishes with parafilm and incubate at room temperature ( 25 °C ).
Examine conidia development/spore germination between 24 - 48:00:00 incubation for single spore isolation.
Adjust the focus point of the dissecting microscope to the surface of the media to find germinating spores.

A small piece of media with the target spore attached should be picked up using a sterilized needle and transferred to 90 mm V8 media plate (containing antibiotic). Place 3-4 individual spores on each plate evenly.

When placing spore on media produce a small cut as you set it down. This will concentrate any bacterial contamination inside the cut and make it easy to avoid during spore isolation (see attached image).
creator: Ido Bar
